purpose: Editorial-order changes proposed after photo audit. Owner MUST review before apply. Once approved, run scripts-tmp/apply-editorial-order-proposal.mjs (to be written).
audit_correction_notes: AUDIT FALSE POSITIVES — no change needed:
- Rugs: already grouped hides (10-70) then jute/kilim (150+). Auditor claim of 'scattered' was wrong.
- Serveware: already grouped trays (420-600), decanters (630-680), tubs (710+). Auditor claim of 'strict alpha' was wrong.
- Tables columns: Bartolo 400, Farrow 410, Toshia 420 already adjacent. Already clustered.
- Chandelier Gideon 2464: image URL returns 200 with 91KB. Not broken.
- Lighting Giesel/Darnell/Maor: all URLs return 200 with 50-200KB. Not broken.
- Boulder 3031/3032: title/slug/image filenames all consistent (48" and 36" respectively). No swap needed.

proposals.rationale: Ingram (black leather) at order 60 breaks a light-fabric run. Cluster with Stanhope (chocolate leather, order 30).
Alabaster votives currently unordered (fall to alpha). Pair them explicitly.
Smoke crystal chandeliers should sit adjacent.
All four firepits currently unordered. Cluster them.

Five Tivoli plinths currently share one image and cluster at the end via alpha fallback, creating a 'glitch' row. Spread them across the grid so the repetition is less obvious until per-size photos exist.
proposals.notes: Alternative: request 5 distinct plinth photos from owner (preferred). Reordering is a workaround, not a fix.
